"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\CrashBox.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\CrashBox.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\CrashBox.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\CrashBox.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o CrashBox.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libCrashBox.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\CrashBox.dir\linkLibs.rsp
